description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs named linter, tests_py2, and tests_py3, using the default test stage. The linter job runs on the python:3.6 image and executes pip install pipenv, pipenv --python 3.6 install --dev, then runs flake8 with E501 and E302 ignored, creates a default ~/.pylintrc file, runs pylint on all *.py files via find -name '*.py' -print0 | xargs -0 pipenv run pylint --py3k --reports=n, and finally runs pipenv check excluding vulnerability IDs 39621 and 38224. The tests_py2 job runs on the python:2.7 image, installs pipenv, creates a Python 2.7 environment with dev dependencies, prints the Python version, and runs unittest discovery in the test directory. The tests_py3 job runs on the python:3.6 image, installs pipenv, creates a Python 3.6 environment with dev dependencies, prints the Python version, and runs unittest discovery in the test directory. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, and all jobs use the specified Docker images.
